parameters.query:
SELECT id, url, brand, model,
  COALESCE(image_url, '') AS image_url,
  COALESCE(power_cv, 0)::int AS power_cv,
  COALESCE(body_type, '') AS body_type,
  COALESCE(city, '') AS city,
  COALESCE(fuel, '') AS fuel,
  COALESCE(transmission, '') AS transmission
FROM moveadvisor_market_offers
WHERE portal = 'autohero'
  AND (
    COALESCE(image_url, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(power_cv, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(body_type, '') = ''
  )
ORDER BY first_seen_at DESC
LIMIT 200
